descriptionZh: Slime 是一只软软的小精灵，整天住在森林深处的青草丛里。它最喜欢的事情就是在月光下打滚，把身体滚得圆圆的。它见到谁都会咧开大嘴笑一笑，从来不会真的生气。
subject: friendly green round slime with big smile and soft jelly body
palette: fresh green, mint, cream highlights

descriptionZh: Zombie 来自一座很老很老的图书馆，他喜欢把翻烂的书页披在身上当披风。他口袋里装满了散落一地的字母，每天都要把它们重新摆一摆。他看起来有点呆呆的，其实只是太爱发呆。
subject: friendly bookish zombie with soft square head and letter patches, not scary
palette: sage green, warm grey, parchment, navy accents

descriptionZh: Dragon 是住在云朵后面的一只老巨龙，鳞片闪着金色的光。他大部分时间都在睡觉，一觉就是一百年。打喷嚏的时候会喷出小小的火苗，把天上的云染成漂亮的橘红色。
subject: gentle red dragon with tiny wings and warm smile, curled tail
palette: deep red, warm gold, orange glow, cream highlights

descriptionZh: 南瓜王戴着藤蔓皇冠，住在最大的那个南瓜里面。每到秋天他就把灯一盏一盏点起来，让回家的小孩不会迷路。他的笑声脆脆的，像踩在落叶上。
subject: crowned jack-o-lantern pumpkin king with vine arms and kind glowing smile
palette: pumpkin orange, leaf green, golden glow, warm brown

descriptionZh: 小妖王是个赤脚的小胖精灵，戴一顶蘑菇帽。森林里所有的萤火虫都听他的口令。傍晚他敲敲蘑菇，全林子的小妖就出来跟他绕着大树跳舞。
subject: chubby small imp king with pointed ears, red mushroom cap and acorn scepter
palette: forest green, mossy brown, honey gold, mushroom red

descriptionZh: 凤凰是一只长着金色尾羽的大鸟，住在最高的果园树梢。每天清晨翅膀一拍就把太阳唤醒。羽毛掉下来就变成秋叶，谁捡到都会觉得手心暖暖的。
subject: long-tailed flame phoenix bird with spread wings and kind round eyes
palette: warm orange, gold, soft red, cream highlights

descriptionZh: 女巫住在云海后面的小阁楼里，每天晚上骑着弯月去看星星。她的尖帽子里藏着小书签，权杖头上的星星会自己唱歌。听见小孩笑声会偷偷飞过来一起转圈圈。
subject: friendly fairy-tale witch with tall pointy hat, crescent moon and star wand
palette: deep purple, midnight blue, silver star accents

descriptionZh: 雪女王披着透明的冰纱，唱起歌来就有大片大片的雪花飘下来。她特别爱穿越寒夜守护迷路的小动物，把它们送回温暖的洞口才放心地飞回北方。
subject: slender fairy snow queen with crystal tiara, icy gown and snowflake accents
palette: ice blue, pearl white, silver, soft lavender

descriptionZh: 独角兽走过的地方会留下淡淡的彩虹。它最喜欢小孩子悄悄递来的方糖，吃完会把头低下来让人摸摸鬃毛。它的水晶角能听见星星说悄悄话。
subject: pastel unicorn with crystal horn, flowing rainbow mane and big shiny eyes
palette: pastel pink, lavender, cream, mint, soft rainbow accents

descriptionZh: 克拉肯住在很深很深的海底，触手长长地能伸到海面捞月光。它有八只手，每只都拿一个不同的乐器。月圆的夜晚，海风里就是它在唱摇篮曲。
subject: round friendly kraken octopus with eight curling tentacles like musical notes
palette: deep teal, coral pink, pearl white, navy accents

descriptionZh: 水母像一盏会游泳的小灯，慢慢飘过蓝色海草。它喜欢收集亮晶晶的泡泡，排成一串给迷路的小鱼照路。
subject: translucent friendly jellyfish with glowing bell and ribbon tentacles
palette: aqua blue, pearl white, soft pink, pale gold

descriptionZh: 哥布林侦察员背着小木望远镜，专门在草丛里寻找掉队的纽扣。它走路很轻，发现朋友时会挥动绿帽子打招呼。
subject: small friendly goblin scout with leaf cap, tiny wooden spyglass and satchel
palette: leaf green, warm brown, honey gold, cream

descriptionZh: 蘑菇小灵住在红伞菇下面，雨后会把露珠擦得亮亮的。它说话声音很小，却能让整片草地都闻到甜甜的泥土香。
subject: tiny smiling mushroom sprite with red cap, leaf scarf and dewdrop lantern
palette: mushroom red, cream, moss green, soft brown

descriptionZh: 苔藓巨友个子很大，脚步却像棉花一样轻。它背上长着小花和青苔，最喜欢让小鸟停在肩膀上讲故事。
subject: large gentle moss troll covered in flowers and moss, round friendly face
palette: moss green, stone grey, flower pink, warm tan

descriptionZh: 小石守卫由许多圆圆的鹅卵石拼成，走一步就叮当响。它会把路边的小石子排成箭头，帮冒险者找到回家的路。
subject: cute pebble golem made of rounded stones with tiny sprout on head
palette: stone grey, moss green, warm beige, soft blue

descriptionZh: 灯火微光像一团会害羞的金色小火苗，住在玻璃灯笼里。夜晚它会轻轻闪烁，提醒大家慢慢走不要摔跤。
subject: small glowing wisp inside a cute lantern, smiling flame face
palette: warm gold, amber, cream, soft navy

descriptionZh: 水晶蝙蝠有透明的小翅膀，飞过洞穴时会发出叮铃声。它不喜欢吓人，只爱把回声唱成短短的歌。
subject: friendly bat with crystal wings and big round ears, not scary
palette: cyan crystal, slate blue, pearl, soft gold

descriptionZh: 云朵狮鹫的翅膀像两片白云，爪子踩到地上几乎没有声音。它每天负责把乱跑的云宝宝送回天空队伍。
subject: cute griffin cub with cloud wings, lion paws and gentle beak
palette: cream, sky blue, golden tan, soft white

descriptionZh: 溪水歌手坐在圆石头上练习发音，尾音会变成一圈圈小水纹。她会把漂来的落叶折成小船，送给路过的孩子。
subject: friendly river nymph with water hair, sitting on smooth stone
palette: river blue, mint, pearl white, willow green

descriptionZh: 林笛小羊有弯弯的小角和毛茸茸的蹄子，随身带着木笛。它吹出的旋律能让树叶一起拍手。
subject: cheerful young satyr with tiny horns, wooden flute and leafy vest
palette: warm brown, leaf green, cream, honey gold

descriptionZh: 莓果小妖总把红莓当帽子戴，口袋里塞满酸甜果子。它很爱分享，只是每次递果子前都要先数三遍。
subject: tiny berry imp with berry hat, round cheeks and little leaf cape
palette: berry red, leaf green, cream, warm brown

descriptionZh: 洞穴鼹仔戴着圆圆矿灯，鼻子能闻到新鲜泥土的方向。它挖洞时会把墙壁磨得很光滑，像地下滑梯。
subject: cute mole creature with miner lamp, tiny paws and soft fur
palette: earth brown, amber light, slate grey, cream

descriptionZh: 齿轮甲虫背上有会转的小发条，走路时滴答滴答。它喜欢修理坏掉的门铃，也会给花朵准时报时。
subject: round clockwork beetle with brass shell, wind-up key and friendly eyes
palette: bronze, teal, warm gold, cream

descriptionZh: 会笑的书喜欢假装自己是普通故事书，等朋友靠近才翻开第一页。它的书页会轻轻挥手，里面全是温柔的谜语。
subject: friendly magical book mimic with smiling cover and page arms
palette: parchment cream, deep red, gold, navy ink

descriptionZh: 宝箱伙伴长着一排圆圆小牙，其实只用来咬苹果。它肚子里装的不是金币，而是彩色贴纸和备用铅笔。
subject: cute treasure chest mimic with rounded teeth, smiling eyes and stickers
palette: warm brown, gold, coral red, cream

descriptionZh: 符文慢龟壳上刻着会发光的字母，走得慢却记性特别好。它愿意停下来听每个人把单词读完。
subject: gentle tortoise with glowing rune shell and wise smile
palette: olive green, warm gold, moss, cream

descriptionZh: 镜光精灵住在一面小圆镜里，最会模仿大家的表情。它每天把笑脸擦亮，让经过的人都能看到勇敢的自己。
subject: shiny mirror sprite with tiny arms, star sparkles and kind face
palette: silver, pale blue, rose, warm gold

descriptionZh: 烛光小幽是一朵温暖的小影子，头顶有不会烫人的烛火。它最怕黑，所以总是把走廊照得亮亮的。
subject: cute candle ghost with tiny warm flame, rounded sheet body, not scary
palette: cream, amber, soft grey, pale blue

descriptionZh: 纸翼守像看起来像石像，其实翅膀是折纸做的。风一吹它就轻轻飞起，帮图书馆把书签送回书里。
subject: friendly gargoyle with folded paper wings, rounded stone body
palette: stone grey, parchment, soft blue, gold

descriptionZh: 大理石朋友身上有漂亮的云纹，喜欢站在喷泉旁边听水声。它会把重重的门推开，让小朋友先通过。
subject: kind marble golem with smooth rounded limbs and flower garland
palette: marble white, soft grey, rose, mint

descriptionZh: 羽翼歌手有彩色翅膀和小竖琴，唱歌时羽毛会轻轻发亮。她喜欢把难读的单词编进旋律里。
subject: friendly harpy bard with feather wings, tiny harp and smiling face
palette: coral, gold, teal, cream

descriptionZh: 羽毛小龙不喷火，只会喷出一串轻飘飘的羽毛。它把羽毛收进枕头里，送给需要午睡的小动物。
subject: small feathered drake with fluffy wings and curled tail
palette: turquoise, warm orange, cream, soft gold

descriptionZh: 小翼龙只有茶杯那么大，却总想练习英雄式降落。它会把翅膀展开成斗篷，认真保护一颗小石头。
subject: tiny friendly wyvern with oversized wings and brave pose
palette: leaf green, amber, cream, warm brown

descriptionZh: 眨眼蜥友有亮亮的大眼睛，但它看人时只会让人想笑。它练习眨眼比赛，赢了也会把奖牌分给朋友。
subject: cute basilisk lizard with big sparkling eyes and tiny crest
palette: lime green, sunny yellow, cream, teal

descriptionZh: 拼拼幼兽像把几种小动物的可爱部分拼在一起。它每天研究自己的尾巴，猜今天会不会打个蝴蝶结。
subject: adorable chimera cub with lion paws, goat ears and snake-like ribbon tail
palette: golden tan, mint, coral, cream

descriptionZh: 软刺小兽尾巴末端像一朵毛球花，完全不会扎人。它喜欢把尾巴当画笔，在沙地上画笑脸。
subject: friendly manticore kitten with fluffy mane and soft pom-pom tail
palette: warm orange, cream, rose, chocolate brown

descriptionZh: 礼貌鹰马见面前一定会先点头，翅膀收得整整齐齐。它跑起来像风，停下来却会等最慢的朋友。
subject: young hippogriff with eagle head, horse body and polite bow
palette: chestnut, cream, sky blue, gold

descriptionZh: 白云飞马的蹄子踩过天空会留下小星点。它喜欢载着信件飞过彩虹，把鼓励的话送到窗边。
subject: gentle white pegasus with cloud mane and small star marks
palette: pearl white, sky blue, lavender, gold

descriptionZh: 月光飞蛾的翅膀像两片小月亮，夜里会安静地发光。它最爱围着睡前故事转圈，让房间变得柔柔的。
subject: large cute moon moth with crescent wing patterns and fuzzy body
palette: pale yellow, moon white, soft blue, lavender

descriptionZh: 星星野兔跳一下，耳朵上的小星点就亮一下。它跑得很快，却总会回头等忘记带铅笔的朋友。
subject: rabbit with star freckles, long ears and tiny cape
palette: warm grey, star gold, navy, cream

descriptionZh: 暖焰小灵像一团会跳舞的篝火，靠近时只会觉得手心暖暖的。它负责给露营队点亮晚餐灯。
subject: friendly flame elemental with rounded fire body and smiling face
palette: orange, gold, soft red, cream

descriptionZh: 水滴小灵身体透明得像一颗大水珠，走路会留下小小涟漪。它会把花园里口渴的花一朵朵浇醒。
subject: cute water droplet elemental with wave arms and gentle eyes
palette: aqua, deep teal, pearl white, mint

descriptionZh: 叶风小灵的身体由许多叶片组成，转身时像一阵绿色旋风。它会把掉落的叶子排成漂亮书签。
subject: leaf elemental made of swirling leaves with friendly face
palette: leaf green, olive, honey gold, cream

descriptionZh: 泥土小灵有圆圆的泥土手臂，头上长着一棵小苗。它每天把松软的土拍平，给种子盖好被子。
subject: round earth elemental with sprout on head and pebble hands
palette: earth brown, moss green, warm beige, gold

descriptionZh: 清风小灵像一条会笑的丝带，飘来飘去不碰倒任何东西。它把风筝托得高高的，也把纸飞机送回手里。
subject: airy swirl elemental with ribbon body and smiling cloud face
palette: sky blue, white, pale teal, soft gold

descriptionZh: 冰晶小灵住在雪花中央，说话会叮叮响。它能在窗上画出小花，但太阳出来前会自己擦干净。
subject: tiny ice sprite with snowflake wings and crystal hat
palette: ice blue, pearl white, silver, lavender

descriptionZh: 雷声小狗打哈欠时会发出小小轰隆声，却一点也不吓人。它摇尾巴能点亮云朵边上的金线。
subject: cute puppy made of storm clouds with lightning tail, friendly
palette: storm blue, gold, white, soft grey

descriptionZh: 彩虹小蛇身上的颜色会慢慢流动，像一条弯弯的彩带。它从不咬人，只用尾巴给朋友指路。
subject: friendly rainbow serpent with smooth rounded body and kind eyes
palette: rainbow colors, cream, soft gold

descriptionZh: 太阳狮子的鬃毛像一圈暖暖的阳光，午后会变得特别蓬松。它喜欢趴在草地上守护午睡时间。
subject: gentle lion with sun-shaped mane and soft paws
palette: gold, orange, cream, warm brown

descriptionZh: 月亮猫头鹰戴着小圆眼镜，翅膀上有银色月纹。它夜里帮星星排队，白天就在树洞里睡觉。
subject: wise friendly owl with moon patterns and tiny glasses
palette: navy, silver, cream, pale yellow

descriptionZh: 珊瑚小蟹背着一小丛彩色珊瑚，横着走也从不迷路。它用钳子轻轻敲贝壳，给海浪打节拍。
subject: cute crab with coral on shell and smiling eyes
palette: coral pink, aqua, pearl, sand

descriptionZh: 海马骑士穿着贝壳盔甲，长枪其实是一根海草。它巡逻时会向每条小鱼敬礼，样子特别认真。
subject: tiny seahorse knight with shell armor and seaweed lance
palette: teal, pearl, gold, coral

descriptionZh: 泡泡海龟会吹出不会破的大泡泡，小鱼可以躲进去玩捉迷藏。它游得很慢，却总能准时到达。
subject: friendly sea turtle blowing bubbles with rounded shell
palette: sea green, aqua, pearl white, soft yellow

descriptionZh: 珍珠人鱼把海星当发夹，唱歌时会有小珍珠滚进贝壳。她喜欢教螃蟹排队，也喜欢听孩子读新词。
subject: child-friendly mermaid with pearl hair clips and gentle smile
palette: pearl white, turquoise, coral, lavender

descriptionZh: 礁石小灵躲在彩色海葵旁，头发像软软的海草。它每天给珊瑚浇海水，还会把贝壳擦亮。
subject: tiny reef sprite with seaweed hair and anemone hat
palette: reef teal, coral, lime, pearl

descriptionZh: 潮汐水獭抱着一块圆石头，在海面上漂来漂去。它最会收集漂流瓶，把里面的愿望送回岸边。
subject: cute otter with tide scarf holding a smooth pebble
palette: brown, aqua, cream, shell pink

descriptionZh: 贝壳蜗牛背着螺旋海螺屋，走过沙滩会留下闪闪的路线。它不着急，因为沿途每粒沙都值得看看。
subject: friendly snail with spiral seashell house and smiling face
palette: sand, shell pink, aqua, cream

descriptionZh: 海星法师戴着小尖帽，五只手各拿一颗泡泡星。它念咒时泡泡会排成单词，然后啪地变成笑声。
subject: cute starfish wizard with tiny pointy hat and bubble stars
palette: orange, purple-blue, aqua, gold

descriptionZh: 海豚小龙有海豚的笑脸和小龙的背鳍，跳出水面时会带起彩虹水花。它最喜欢和浪花比赛。
subject: friendly dolphin-like drake with small fins and dragon tail
palette: ocean blue, aqua, white, coral

descriptionZh: 雪山毛友全身毛茸茸，脚印像两只大棉拖鞋。它会把热可可捧给登山的小伙伴，还提醒大家戴围巾。
subject: gentle fluffy yeti with scarf and warm cocoa cup
palette: snow white, ice blue, warm red, cream

descriptionZh: 雪球哥布林把雪球当背包，里面藏着胡萝卜鼻子和备用手套。它会认真修补雪人，直到每个雪人都笑起来。
subject: small friendly snow goblin with snowball backpack and mittens
palette: icy blue, carrot orange, cream, soft green

descriptionZh: 冰柱小妖头上挂着透明冰帽，走路会发出清脆铃声。它喜欢把冰柱排成风铃，送给北风当礼物。
subject: tiny imp with icicle hat, translucent ears and kind smile
palette: ice blue, silver, white, pale teal

descriptionZh: 极光狐狸尾巴像一条会发光的彩带，跑过雪地时天空也会跟着变亮。它会带迷路的人找到温暖木屋。
subject: fox with glowing aurora tail and fluffy winter fur
palette: teal, magenta, navy, white

descriptionZh: 极地石守由圆冰石组成，胸口有一盏小蓝灯。它站在风雪里给大家挡风，自己却只觉得凉快。
subject: round polar golem made of ice stones with glowing chest light
palette: ice blue, stone grey, white, soft cyan

descriptionZh: 云端巨人把云朵当枕头，打喷嚏会吹出一群小白羊云。它声音很低，却总是轻轻说话怕吓到鸟。
subject: gentle cloud giant with fluffy beard and tiny birds nearby
palette: white, sky blue, warm grey, gold

descriptionZh: 天空鲸鱼慢慢游过蓝天，肚子下面挂着几颗小星铃。它唱歌时，云朵会排成柔软的楼梯。
subject: floating friendly whale with tiny wings and star bells
palette: sky blue, white, lavender, gold

descriptionZh: 旋风精灵住在一只小瓶子里，出来时会变成卷卷的清风。它最会吹干湿袜子，也会帮风车转圈。
subject: friendly wind djinn emerging as a soft spiral breeze
palette: turquoise, white, gold, pale grey

descriptionZh: 雨云小灵穿着小雨衣，随身带一把迷你闪电伞。它会把大雨分成小雨滴，让花园慢慢喝水。
subject: tiny storm sprite with raincoat and lightning umbrella
palette: storm blue, yellow, white, teal

descriptionZh: 彗星小龙尾巴后面拖着星尘，飞过夜空像一支亮亮的铅笔。它会在天空写下晚安两个字。
subject: small dragon with comet tail and star dust trail, gentle face
palette: midnight blue, gold, orange, cream

descriptionZh: 沙丘地精戴着宽宽的遮阳帽，胡子里总有几粒闪亮细沙。它会用小铲子堆城堡，还给每座城堡插旗。
subject: friendly desert gnome with sun hat and tiny shovel
palette: sand gold, teal, warm brown, cream

descriptionZh: 仙人掌小妖身上长着软软的小刺，抱起来像毛线球。它每天给自己浇一滴水，然后开心地开一朵小花。
subject: cute cactus imp with soft rounded spines and flower on head
palette: cactus green, flower pink, sand, gold

descriptionZh: 谜语狮崽喜欢坐在小石台上问简单问题。答对了它会眯眼点头，答错了也会给一个提示。
subject: friendly sphinx cub with tiny wings and thoughtful smile
palette: golden sand, teal, cream, soft brown

descriptionZh: 甲虫骑士穿着亮亮的壳甲，盾牌像一颗小太阳。它很守规矩，过桥前一定排队。
subject: cute scarab beetle knight with round shield and shiny shell
palette: emerald, gold, sand, navy

descriptionZh: 海市蜃猫走路像一阵热风，影子会慢半拍跟上来。它喜欢躲猫猫，但尾巴上的铃铛总会泄密。
subject: mysterious friendly desert cat with shimmering tail bell
palette: sand, peach, teal, gold

descriptionZh: 阳光蝾螈趴在暖石头上晒太阳，背上有小小太阳斑。它会把冷掉的面包轻轻烤热。
subject: cute salamander with sun spots and warm smile
palette: orange, yellow, sand, cream

descriptionZh: 沙卷小旋像一团会跳舞的小龙卷，转起来却不会弄脏衣服。它负责把沙地上的脚印扫成花纹。
subject: friendly small dust whirlwind with smiling eyes and scarf
palette: tan, warm grey, pale blue, gold

descriptionZh: 绿洲青蛙坐在荷叶伞下，口袋里装着清凉薄荷叶。它叫一声，水面就会冒出圆圆泡泡。
subject: cute frog with lotus umbrella near oasis water
palette: fresh green, aqua, mint, sand

descriptionZh: 金塔小灵住在小小金字塔顶端，负责擦亮星光入口。它最爱把沙粒排成箭头，帮旅人绕开热石头。
subject: tiny pyramid sprite with triangular hat and star lantern
palette: sand gold, turquoise, cream, warm brown

descriptionZh: 余烬狐狸的尾巴像一串温暖炭火，跑步时只留下淡淡金光。它会帮露营的小朋友看好篝火。
subject: small fox with glowing ember tail and soft paws
palette: ember orange, dark brown, gold, cream

descriptionZh: 熔岩圆蛙坐在温热岩石上，肚子一鼓一鼓像小灯笼。它只会吐出暖气泡，给冷手取暖。
subject: round friendly lava toad with glowing belly spots
palette: lava orange, charcoal, gold, cream

descriptionZh: 灰烬守卫由软软的灰云和黑石块组成，动作慢慢的。它会把熄灭的火堆整理干净，留下安全的营地。
subject: gentle ash golem with rounded charcoal stones and soft smoke puff
palette: charcoal, warm grey, ember orange, cream

descriptionZh: 火星蝙蝠翅膀边缘亮着小火星，飞起来像夜空里的逗号。它会把火星收进小罐子，照亮回家的路。
subject: cute bat with glowing ember wing edges, not scary
palette: charcoal, ember red, gold, soft brown

descriptionZh: 火花小灵像一颗淘气的小星星，笑起来会蹦出金色火花。它总把火花变成烟花，但声音只有噗的一下。
subject: tiny spark sprite shaped like star flame with happy face
palette: gold, orange, cream, red

descriptionZh: 焰鬃小马有柔软的火焰鬃毛，摸起来像晒过太阳的毛毯。它跑过原野时，会给露珠镀上一层金边。
subject: friendly pony with soft flame mane and tiny hoof sparks
palette: golden yellow, orange, cream, chestnut

descriptionZh: 暖壳蜗牛背着像小火山的壳，里面只冒温柔热气。它走得慢，适合陪大家练习耐心。
subject: cute snail with tiny volcano shell and warm steam
palette: lava orange, dark stone, cream, gold

descriptionZh: 蔷薇小狼的毛里夹着柔软花瓣，鼻子总能闻到新开的花。它嚎叫时不像狼，更像在唱摇篮曲。
subject: friendly wolf cub with rose briar collar and soft eyes
palette: rose red, forest green, warm grey, cream

descriptionZh: 橡果骑士戴着橡果头盔，盾牌是一片圆圆树叶。它个子很小，却坚持护送蚂蚁队伍过小溪。
subject: tiny acorn knight with leaf shield and twig sword
palette: acorn brown, leaf green, honey gold, cream

descriptionZh: 蜂蜜小熊背着一只小蜂蜜罐，走到哪里都香香甜甜。它会把蜂蜜分给咳嗽的朋友，还给蜜蜂说谢谢。
subject: cute bear cub with honey pot backpack and bee friend
palette: honey gold, warm brown, cream, leaf green

descriptionZh: 柔刺树灵的头发像藤蔓，刺尖都包着小叶子。她守护花园入口，提醒大家轻轻走路别踩幼苗。
subject: friendly dryad with vine hair and soft leaf-covered thorns
palette: forest green, rose, bark brown, cream

descriptionZh: 柳树长者的枝条像长长胡须，说话慢得像摇篮曲。它喜欢把阴凉借给读书的孩子，也听鸟儿汇报天气。
subject: gentle willow treant with long branch beard and kind eyes
palette: willow green, bark brown, cream, soft blue

descriptionZh: 花粉小仙背着透明翅膀，飞过花朵时会打一个小喷嚏。她把花粉撒得刚刚好，让每朵花都精神起来。
subject: tiny pixie with translucent wings and pollen pouch
palette: sunny yellow, flower pink, mint, cream

descriptionZh: 四叶小怪喜欢把幸运草别在耳朵后面，收集掉落的鞋带。它很会打结，能把礼物绑得漂漂亮亮。
subject: small friendly kobold with clover ear charm and rope belt
palette: clover green, warm brown, cream, gold

descriptionZh: 蕨叶蜥蜴背上长着一排小蕨叶，趴在树根旁几乎看不见。它喜欢玩安静的捉迷藏，找到后会眨眨眼。
subject: cute lizard with fern fronds along its back
palette: fern green, moss, tan, cream

descriptionZh: 菇帽大友虽然叫大怪，其实只爱搬重篮子。它戴着大蘑菇帽，走进森林时会弯腰不碰小树枝。
subject: large gentle ogre wearing huge toadstool cap and carrying basket
palette: mushroom red, moss green, warm tan, cream

descriptionZh: 玩具小兵站得笔直，鼓声一响就迈开短短步子。它守护玩具箱，晚上还会帮散落的积木排队。
subject: friendly wooden toy soldier with rounded hat and tiny drum
palette: deep red, navy, gold, cream

descriptionZh: 瓷娃娃守护穿着小披肩，脸上永远是温柔微笑。她会把掉在地上的缎带捡起来，系成漂亮蝴蝶结。
subject: gentle porcelain doll guardian with shawl and ribbon bow
palette: soft pink, porcelain white, lavender, gold

descriptionZh: 纽扣魔像由各种圆纽扣拼成，胸口最大那颗会闪光。它最擅长修补外套，让每颗纽扣都回到位置。
subject: cute golem made of colorful buttons with thread arms
palette: teal, red, yellow, cream

descriptionZh: 袜子小龙喜欢把丢失的袜子卷成小窝，打喷嚏会喷出棉絮云。它能帮大家找到另一只袜子。
subject: small dragon made of soft socks with cotton puff sneeze
palette: soft blue, coral, cream, yellow

descriptionZh: 风筝长蛇身体像彩色风筝串，尾巴系着长长飘带。它飞得很高，却总把线交给最小的朋友握着。
subject: friendly serpent shaped like colorful kites with ribbon tail
palette: red, teal, yellow, cream

descriptionZh: 八音盒仙子站在小小发条台上，转一圈就洒出几颗音符星。她的音乐很轻，适合睡前复习单词。
subject: tiny music box fairy on wind-up base with note-shaped sparkles
palette: rose, gold, mint, cream
